notes: Power can be supplied either via the DC 12V barrel jack (from the included AC adapter) or via PoE++ (IEEE 802.3bt) over the LAN RJ-45 port. The RS-422 control port uses an RJ-45 physical connector (not a standard DB9). USB is referenced in some marketing material as a control method but is not listed as a physical hardware port in the official spec table. SDI output is 3G-SDI (SMPTE 424M); the camera does not output 4K over SDI — 4K is HDMI and IP only. The G/L In BNC grade is omitted as it is an analog sync signal, not a bandwidth-graded interface.

ports.name: G/L In
ports.note: Genlock input; Black Burst Sync (BBS) and tri-level sync

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 100BASE-TX/1000BASE-T; IP control, IP streaming (NDI/HX, SRT); also carries PoE++ power (IEEE 802.3bt, 42–57 V)

ports.name: RS-422 Control In
ports.note: Serial control via RJ-45 (AW protocol); max cable 1000 m

ports.name: Mic/Line In
ports.note: Stereo mini jack; Mic level -40 dBV, Line level -10 dBV; plug-in power 2.5 V±0.5 V

ports.name: DC 12V In
ports.note: 10.8–13.2 V DC from supplied AC adapter; alternative to PoE++ via LAN
